title: Amanita
description: Client-sided Fabric mod that adds cosmetic tweaks such as particle trails, flipping entities and changing the star count
body:
AMANITA HAS BEEN MERGED WITH [YTTRIUM](https://modrinth com/mod/yttrium). Please download it instead ❤️

Amanita is the companion mod of [Yttrium](https://modrinth.com/mod/yttrium), Amanita is focused on cosmetics while Yttrium is focused around utility changes.

Amanita currently features:
- Client-sided particles that follow/surround the player
  - Choose from any particle type in Minecraft
  - Choose from a series of custom made particle styles (how the particles appear around the player)
- The ability to flip certain entities in the game world
  - You can individually enable or disable the flipping of your own player model, other player models and mobs
- The ability to change the stars in the night sky
  - You can individually edit the seed used to generate the stars and the max number of stars that will be spawned (requires restart)
- The ability to change the Z axis in the centre of the debug menu to show as a complete blue rather than a washed out blue
- An option to remove bobbers that are stuck in your head so they do not obstruct your vision
